learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Your dreams deserve a plan — next is your customer
learn.summary: Week 1 started with YOU. Week 2 fills the Customer block of the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas.
bullets: FEC progress: YOU (complete) → CUSTOMER (this week) → Value, Activities, Income (Week 3) → 3-Year Plan (Week 4)
Bring your future-self letter and one dream photo from Week 1
Define who you would genuinely love to help — not everyone
Customer segments, jobs-to-be-done, pains, and gains
learn.callout: Read before class. Your coach connects your Dream Board to the people you will serve.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Customer discovery lab
workshop.summary: Facilitated persona work using your Week 1 vision as the starting point.
bullets: Share one Dream Board insight and who it points you toward serving
Draft interview questions with your squad
Map early persona hypotheses (who, why, urgent problem)
workshop.callout: Mark complete after your classroom session.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Customer persona draft
assignment.summary: Document who you want to serve and why — FEC Customer block.
bullets: Describe your ideal client in concrete terms
List their top jobs, pains, and gains
Note one group you would enjoy helping most

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What did you learn about your market?
prompts: Who surprised you as a potential client?
What problem feels most urgent to solve?
How does this customer connect to the life you want to build?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 2 complete
submit.summary: Unlock Week 3 — Value, Activities, and Income on the FEC.
bullets: Customer block ready for canvas work
